Site.title: ZUMEN — DIY Blueprints You Can Actually Build
Site.description: From blueprints to materials, build steps, and store-specific shopping lists. ZUMEN takes DIY beyond "that looks nice" and into "I can actually build this" — iOS app and web service.

Home.metaTitle: ZUMEN | DIY Blueprints & Auto-Generated Lumber Lists
Home.metaDescription: 22 free DIY blueprints — shelves, benches, wood decks, and more. Just enter your size and get a lumber list and cost estimate for Cainz, Komeri, Kohnan, or DCM. For beginners through advanced DIYers.
Home.ogTitle: ZUMEN | DIY Blueprints & Auto-Generated Lumber Lists
Home.ogDescription: 22 DIY blueprints — shelves, benches, wood decks. Enter a size, get a Cainz / Komeri-ready material list automatically.
Home.twitterTitle: ZUMEN | DIY Blueprints & Auto-Generated Lumber Lists
Home.twitterDescription: Auto-generate material lists from 22 blueprints. Cainz & Komeri supported.
Home.heroLabel: DIY, all the way to actually built
Home.heroBodyLine1: Blueprints, lumber lists, build steps, and cost — all in one place.
Home.heroBodyLine2: DIY that doesn't stop at "that looks nice."

Home.feature1Desc: Hand-picked, professional-quality blueprints for shelves, benches, decks, and more — free.
Home.feature2Desc: Just enter width and height; the optimal material plan and cost are calculated automatically. App-only.

Store.metaDescriptionTpl: DIY blueprints with materials available at {name} — shelves, planter stands, compost bins, and more.
Store.appCtaTitleTpl: Get the {name} material list in the app
Store.appCtaDescription: Generate a shopping list with product links on the spot. Smooth in-store buying.
Store.descCainz: About 230 stores nationwide. Stocks SPF lumber, screws, and hardware for DIY.
Store.descKomeri: About 1,200 stores nationwide. Strong selection of agriculture and gardening supplies, too.
Store.descKohnan: About 350 stores, mainly across the Kansai, Chugoku, and Kyushu regions. Great tool and lumber selection.
Store.descDcm: A nationwide chain with about 670 stores. Wide selection and competitive pricing.

Support.lead: If anything is unclear or broken, please reach out.
Support.contactBody: For bug reports, feature requests, or account deletion, email the address below.
Support.contactNote: We typically reply within 2–3 business days.

faq.a: Currently Cainz and Komeri are supported. We plan to add more.

faq.q: Are the prices in the material list real-time?
faq.a: Prices are updated periodically but may differ from the actual in-store price. Please verify in store or on the retailer's website before purchase.

faq.q: Where can I watch step-by-step videos for examples?
faq.a: Step videos are an iOS app-only feature. The author can play them directly. Other users can watch by viewing a rewarded ad (about 30 seconds), purchasing a single example, or subscribing to Premium. The web only shows poster frames.

faq.q: How do I cancel my Premium subscription?
faq.a: Cancel from iOS "Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions", or from "Profile > Settings > Manage Subscription" in the app. Premium features remain available until your next renewal date.
Try "Profile > Settings > Restore Purchases" in the app. If that doesn't work, please contact support and include your transactionID.

faq.q: I want to delete an example I posted
faq.a: In-app deletion is coming soon. For now, please contact us via the form below to request deletion.

faq.q: I want to delete my account
faq.a: Please contact us via the form below with "Account deletion request" in the message.

User.followAppGateDescription: Follow users so you don't miss their new builds. Following is app-only.
